subcodes.first_line: O exalted one, render thanks unto God, for thou hast taken refuge in the impregnable Cave and hast entered beneath the shadow of His wondrous Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیع حمد کن خدا را که پناه بکهف منیع بردی و در ظل امر بدیع درآمدی هر شریفی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement
